name: Ghost Outline
scaffolding_intent: Displays an amorphous shape with a question mark that dissolves, scaffolding absence — something is missing from the narration

parameters.name: puddleColor
parameters.description: Color of the dark puddle shape

parameters.name: ghostOpacity
parameters.description: Opacity of the ghost outline entity

correction_intent: Child referenced an entity that is NOT in the current scene AND is from a different scene (e.g. mentioning a character from scene 1 while narrating scene 3). Do NOT use this when the child simply misnames a present entity — that is I1_spotlight. C3 is ONLY for entities truly absent from the scene.
suggestion_intent: Child could reference an entity that appeared in a previous or upcoming scene but is absent from the current scene, to create narrative continuity.
